english: to solve / to loosen / to dissolve / to release
notes: Can be used both reflexively (sich lösen – to come loose, to dissolve) and non-reflexively (ein Problem lösen – to solve a problem). The reflexive form 'sich lösen' often means to detach or free oneself from something.

sentences.german: Er löst das schwierige Rätsel in wenigen Minuten.
sentences.english: He solves the difficult puzzle in a few minutes.

sentences.german: Die Schüler haben alle Aufgaben gelöst.
sentences.english: The students have solved all the tasks.

sentences.german: Sie hat sich von ihrer alten Gewohnheit gelöst.
sentences.english: She has freed herself from her old habit.
